calendar.matters:
Petition For: 1. Order Construing Trust Instrument And Determining Persons Entitled To Distribution (Probate Cod 17200(B)(1) And (4)); 2. Instructions Regarding Proposed Real Property Sale (Probate Code 17200(B)(6)); And 3. Order Allowing Payment Of Trustee Fees For Real Property Sale (Probate Code 17200(B)(9))
Off Calendar Jul-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Petition For: 1. Order Construing Trust Instrument And Determining Persons Entitled To Distribution (Probate Cod 17200(B)(1) And (4)); 2. Instructions Regarding Proposed Real Property Sale (Probate Code 17200(B)(6)); And 3. Order Allowing Payment Of Trustee Fees For Real Property Sale (Probate Code 17200(B)(9))
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Jul-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For: 1. Order Construing Trust Instrument And Determining Persons Entitled To Distribution (Probate Cod 17200(B)(1) And (4)); 2. Instructions Regarding Proposed Real Property Sale (Probate Code 17200(B)(6)); And 3. Order Allowing Payment Of Trustee Fees For Real Property Sale (Probate Code 17200(B)(9))
Off Calendar May-10-2021 Continued To Jul-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Frank Cialone, via ZOOM, counsel for Wells Fargo, Petitioner; Kimberly Strickland, via ZOOM, counsel for Anna Mie Allendorfer, Beneficiary.

The court queries counsel at the outset regarding notice to Elisa Schon. Mr. Cialone reports that he has heard from Elisa's mother Claudia and that Elisa had been mailed notice to an address in Germany and believes that notice has been properly served. The court would like to continue the matter to confirm that service has been properly effected on all interested parties.

After additional discussion, the court continues the Petition for Order Construing Trust Instrument, etc., to July 12, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
